name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022
disclaimer: This maps ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls to NIST 800-53 for compliance tracking. This is NOT an ISO certification assessment. Consult an accredited certification body for formal ISO 27001 certification.

requirements.name: Information Security Policies
requirements.description: Management direction and support for information security

requirements.name: Human Resource Security
requirements.description: Security responsibilities of personnel before, during, and after employment

requirements.name: Physical and Environmental Security
requirements.description: Physical access controls and protection of facilities

requirements.name: Technology Security
requirements.description: Access control, cryptography, operations security, communications security

checklist.text: Information security policies defined, approved, published, and communicated
Information security roles and responsibilities assigned
Segregation of duties implemented
Threat intelligence collected and analyzed
Inventory of information and associated assets maintained
Access control policy defined and implemented
Authentication information managed securely
Information security in supplier relationships addressed
Information security incident management planned and prepared
ICT continuity planned, implemented, and tested
Information security awareness, education, and training provided
Physical security perimeters defined and implemented
User endpoint devices secured
Privileged access rights restricted and managed
Secure authentication implemented
Protection against malware implemented
Technical vulnerabilities managed
Information backup procedures established and tested
Logging and monitoring activities established
Networks secured and protected
Cryptography used to protect information
Secure development lifecycle applied
